title: Bloom Energy’s AI Data Center Growth Story Is Starting to Crack
excerpt: Bloom Energy soared on the AI data center boom, but a high-profile project rejection in New Mexico and a spreading wave of community opposition are raising q...
content_html:
Rich Duprey

Sat, July 18, 2026 at 7:14 AM CDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) has surged 149% in 2026 but sits 39% below its June peak as investors begin pricing in execution risk.

  • Oracle's Project Jupiter, a $165 billion New Mexico AI campus planning 2.45 GW of Bloom fuel cells, was rejected by regulators for a second time.

  • New York's one-year statewide data center moratorium signals that regulatory resistance is expanding beyond local disputes into state-level policy risk.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Bloom Energy didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Artificial intelligence has turned power infrastructure into one of the market's hottest investment themes in 2026. As hyperscale data centers multiply, companies that can supply electricity quickly have become Wall Street favorites. That enthusiasm has lifted everything from utilities to turbine manufacturers and fuel cell providers. 

Yet the same growth story that fueled many of those gains is beginning to run into a less predictable obstacle: local opposition. For investors, the next phase of the AI infrastructure buildout may depend as much on regulators and communities as it does on technology. That shift matters for Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE).

Momentum Is Moving the Wrong Direction

Bloom Energy has delivered an enviable return in 2026, with the stock climbing 149% year to date. Yet that headline figure hides a growing loss of momentum. Shares now sit roughly 39% below the June peak after investors began reassessing how quickly the company's biggest opportunities can translate into revenue.

The first blow came earlier this month when a short seller questioned Bloom's long-term growth assumptions and customer concentration. While the market didn't fully embrace the bearish thesis, it added another layer of uncertainty just as expectations for AI infrastructure spending had become increasingly optimistic.

Now another development has put the spotlight back on execution risk.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Bloom Energy didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Project Jupiter Faces Another Roadblock

Oracle's (NYSE:ORCL) proposed Stargate campus in New Mexico, called Project Jupiter, represents a planned $165 billion investment, making it one of the largest AI infrastructure projects under development. The project originally planned to rely on a natural gas-fired power plant, but following concerns from local officials and residents over emissions and water consumption, that was abandoned in favor of deploying up to 2.45 gigawatts of Bloom Energy's solid oxide fuel cell technology.

sentences.zh: 甲骨文（纽约证券交易所股票代码：ORCL）拟在新墨西哥州建设 Stargate 园区，名为“木星计划”，计划投资 1,650 亿美元，使其成为正在开发的最大的人工智能基础设施项目之一。

sentences.en: The project originally planned to rely on a natural gas-fired power plant, but following concerns from local officials and residents over emissions and water consumption, that was abandoned in favor of deploying up to 2.45 gigawatts of Bloom Energy's solid oxide fuel cell technology.
sentences.zh: 该项目最初计划依靠天然气发电厂，但由于当地官员和居民对排放和水消耗的担忧，该项目被放弃，转而采用 Bloom Energy 高达 2.45 吉瓦的固体氧化物燃料电池技术。

content_html_zh:
里奇·杜普雷

2026 年 7 月 18 日星期六上午 7:14 CDT 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • Bloom Energy（纽约证券交易所股票代码：BE）在 2026 年飙升了 149%，但由于投资者开始对执行风险进行定价，该公司股价较 6 月份峰值低 39%。
  • Oracle 的 Jupiter 项目是耗资 1650 亿美元的新墨西哥州人工智能园区，规划装机容量为 2.45 吉瓦的 Bloom 燃料电池，第二次被监管机构拒绝。
  • 纽约全州数据中心为期一年的暂停表明，监管阻力正在从地方纠纷扩大到州级政策风险。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Bloom Energy 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

人工智能让电力基础设施成为2026年市场最热门的投资主题之一。 随着超大规模数据中心的激增，能够快速供电的公司已成为华尔街的宠儿。 这种热情鼓舞了从公用事业公司到涡轮机制造商和燃料电池供应商的一切事物。

然而，推动许多成果的增长故事正开始遇到一个难以预测的障碍：当地的反对。 对于投资者来说，人工智能基础设施建设的下一阶段可能既依赖于技术，也依赖于监管机构和社区。 这种转变对于布鲁姆能源公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：BE）来说很重要。

势头正朝着错误的方向发展

Bloom Energy 在 2026 年实现了令人羡慕的回报，该股今年迄今已上涨 149%。 然而，这一总体数字掩盖了动力的日益丧失。 在投资者开始重新评估该公司最大的机会转化为收入的速度后，该公司股价目前较 6 月份峰值低约 39%。

第一个打击出现在本月早些时候，当时一名卖空者质疑布鲁姆的长期增长假设和客户集中度。 尽管市场并未完全接受这一看跌论点，但随着对人工智能基础设施支出的预期变得越来越乐观，它又增加了一层不确定性。

现在，另一项进展使执行风险重新成为人们关注的焦点。

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Bloom Energy 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

木星计划面临另一个障碍

甲骨文（纽约证券交易所股票代码：ORCL）拟在新墨西哥州建设 Stargate 园区，名为“木星计划”，计划投资 1,650 亿美元，使其成为正在开发的最大的人工智能基础设施项目之一。 该项目最初计划依靠天然气发电厂，但由于当地官员和居民对排放和水消耗的担忧，该项目被放弃，转而采用 Bloom Energy 高达 2.45 吉瓦的固体氧化物燃料电池技术。
